title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China released JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid with a dual-brain AI system for real-time perception and control. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoids for security, homes, and industrial applications. NVIDIA released Isaac GR00T, an open robot reference design with Jetson Thor processors, providing researchers with a six-foot platform and over two thousand teraflops of onboard compute.
